volumeTitle: Stichus. Trinummus. Truculentus. Tale of a Travelling Bag. Fragments
label: Trinummus (Section 5.2.1178 - Section 5.2.1189b)

translation.label: Scaife English translation
translation.citation: Trinummus: The Three Pieces of Money

sections.label: Section 5.2.1178
sections.original: Recte . tuom patrem rediisse salvom peregre gaudeo .
sections.translation: All ’ s well . I am glad to say that your father has returned from abroad .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1179d
sections.translation: Aye , and you yourself may see him too .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1180
sections.translation: O my father , my father , blessings on you .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1180b
sections.translation: Many blessings on you , my son .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1181b
sections.translation: Have no fear , nothing has happened . My affairs prosperously managed , I have returned safe . If you are only wishful to be steady , that daughter of Callicles has been promised you .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1183b
sections.translation: I will marry both her , father , and any one else besides that you shall bid me .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1184b
sections.translation: Although I have been angry with you ,

sections.label: Section 5.2.1185
sections.original: miseria una uni quidem hominist adfatim .
sections.translation: one misery [*] , in fact , is more than enough for one man .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1185b
sections.translation: Nay , rather , ’ twere too little for him ; for if he were to marry a hundred wives for his sins , it were too little .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1187
sections.translation: But henceforth , in future , I will be steady .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1187b
sections.translation: So you say ; if you will only do it .

sections.label: Section 5.2.1188
sections.original: Numquid causaest quin uxorem cras domum ducam ?
sections.translation: Is there any reason why I should not bring my wife home to-morrow ?

sections.label: Section 5.2.1188b
sections.translation: ’ Tis very good . And you , Lysiteles , be ready to be married the day after to-morrow .
